testcase.name: DocumentImporter > renders the dropzone with the file input and format badges
DocumentImporter > shows analyzing state immediately after picking a file
DocumentImporter > shows ready state with chapter count after successful analysis
DocumentImporter > shows generic error when the API returns IMPORT_FAILED
DocumentImporter > shows unsupported format error when the API returns FORMAT_UNSUPPORTED
DocumentImporter > shows file too large error before calling the API when file exceeds 50 MB
DocumentImporter > shows generic error on network failure
document import parser isolation > docx import does not load the pdf parser
document import parser isolation > builds multiple chapters from markdown headings
document import parser isolation > docx import prefers mammoth html extraction for chapter-aware parsing
POST /api/projects/import > returns 401 when user is not authenticated
POST /api/projects/import > returns 400 when no file is provided
POST /api/projects/import > returns 413 when file is too large
POST /api/projects/import > returns summarized analysis on successful import
POST /api/projects/import > returns IMPORT_FAILED when parser throws
